M0870_DSCHG_DISP (M0870) Discharge Disposition Where the patient is after discharge. 01 = Patient remained in the community (not in hospital, nursing home, or rehab facility).
02 = Patient transferred to a noninstitutional hospice.
03 = Unknown because patient moved to a geographic location not served by this agency.
UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0880_AFDC_OTH_AST (M0880) Assistance/Services Provided By Community Resources
